problems.title: Prefix Running Sum
problems.prompt: Given an integer array nums, build a new array where each index i stores the sum of all elements from nums[0] through nums[i]. Return that prefix-sum array.

problems.title: Pair Sum Exists
problems.prompt: Given an integer array nums and an integer target, return true if any two distinct indices i and j satisfy nums[i] + nums[j] == target. Otherwise return false.

problems.title: Rotate Right by K
problems.prompt: Rotate the array nums to the right by k steps. A right rotation moves the last element to the front. Perform the rotation in-place and return the modified array.

problems.title: Maximum Contiguous Sum
problems.prompt: Given an integer array nums, find the contiguous subarray (containing at least one number) that has the largest sum, and return that sum.

problems.title: Product Except Self
problems.prompt: Given an integer array nums, return an array answer such that answer[i] equals the product of every element in nums except nums[i]. You must solve it without using division, and in O(n) time.
constraints: The product of any prefix or suffix fits in a 32-bit integer

problems.title: Merge Overlapping Intervals
problems.prompt: Given an array of intervals where intervals[i] = [start_i, end_i], merge all overlapping intervals and return an array of the non-overlapping intervals that cover all the input intervals.

problems.title: Trapped Rain Water
problems.prompt: Given n non-negative integers representing an elevation map where the width of each bar is 1, compute how much water it can trap after raining.

problems.title: First Missing Positive
problems.prompt: Given an unsorted integer array nums, return the smallest missing positive integer. Your algorithm should run in O(n) time and use constant extra space.
